channel.title: Terminal Dev Blog
channel.description: Notes on terminal tools, TUI development, and command-line workflows

item.title: Building a File Viewer in Rust
item.description: How we built peek — a modern terminal file viewer with syntax highlighting, image rendering, and theme support. Covers syntect integration, glyph-matched ASCII art, and the challenges of true color output.

item.title: The Art of Terminal Color
item.description: A deep dive into 24-bit true color, ANSI escape sequences, and how to build a theme system that degrades gracefully across terminal capabilities.

item.title: ASCII Art Image Rendering
item.description: From pixels to glyphs: how character-density mapping, two-color clustering, and font-aware glyph selection produce surprisingly detailed terminal images.
